title: An Act to Provide a Property Tax Exemption for Allowing Shellfish Harvester Access to the Intertidal Zone
final_disposition: Ought Not to Pass Pursuant To Joint Rule 310, Apr 29, 2025
last_house_action: 3/28/2025 - Received by the Clerk of the House on March 28, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TAXATION pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2025 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)
